utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items requested in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 items appear in the final property solution. Now check each for full specification with details: 1) property: includes selected property name, price, address, bedrooms — sufficient details and price provided. 2) financing: includes type, down payment, mortgage amount, interest rate, monthly payment estimate, arrangement fee — detailed and complete. 3) legal_services: includes itemized costs (basic legal package, land transfer tax estimate, title insurance, disbursements) and a total — complete. 4) moving_services: provides only a single standard moving estimate cost — acceptable as costs included, though minimal; still meets “moving arrangements with costs.” 5) setup_services: includes utility and setup services (survey, utilities connection, internet setup) with costs and a total — complete. 6) total_budget: includes cost breakdown lines and a grand total initial outlay — complete. Therefore, all 6 items are present and reasonably fully specified per the requested format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final solution includes: Property: Historic Townhouse. Financing: Traditional Mortgage (80% LTV). Legal services: Basic Legal Package. Moving services: Standard Moving. Setup services: Basic Utilities (utilities connection) and Property Survey (they called it Basic Survey at CAD $300). Each of these corresponds directly to items in the ground-truth ratings with explicit names and ratings.
